title: SAT20 Agent Wallet testnet open and expand drill plan
context: Current drill starts from ordinary stp.open, expands existing plain-sat UTXOs at the channel address, recreates Runes and BRC20 splicing-in evidence, runs unlock/lock, performs a small splicing-out, and ends after a punish drill.

expand_l1_utxos.planned_use: small plain sats expand or state-movement evidence

asset_plan.brc20: create new stp.splicing_in evidence; let runtime mint a transfer inscription if no suitable transfer UTXO exists

l1_wait_policy.rule: Do not retry the same value-moving operation or reuse related UTXOs before the L1 transaction is confirmed or proven absent.

evidence_to_collect: current Runes and BRC20 splicing-in evidence
current small splicing-out deAnchor and L1 txids
current retained old commitment and punish txids
